title: leontodon stenocalathius
intro: Leontodon stenocalathius, also known as the autumn hawk's-beard or narrow-leaved hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the daisy family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon stenocalathius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe wounds. Leontodon stenocalathius is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
